name: Bid Wall Absorption with Tight Spread Filter
hypothesis: A strong bid imbalance (high obi_1) combined with aggressive selling being absorbed (negative trade imbalance) predicts an up-move. Adding a tight spread filter (spread_bps < 5) should improve signal purity by isolating it to high-liquidity regimes, addressing the parent's low trade count and inconsistent performance.
mutation_note: Parent's volatility filter was redundant. Per feedback, replacing it with a tight spread filter to test a different hypothesis for improving signal purity.
